scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=backend; npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend
scripts.contracts:deploy:testnet: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --verify -vvvv
scripts.contracts:deploy:mainnet: cd contracts && forge script script/DeployMainnet.s.sol --rpc-url base --broadcast --verify -vvvv
